p.underline: APPLICATION TO REGISTER FOR LESS THAN 15 UNITS DURING THE 2005/2006/ HARMATTAN SEMESTER

text.p: I hereby apply to register for less than 15 Units courses in the current Harmattan Semester. The courses are HFC 303 (2 units), PHE 401 (4 Units).
These are the course I have for the semester.
I will be grateful if my request is granted.
